news.headline: US professional development market set to expand by $4.82B (2023-2028) due to AI impact - Technavio report.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, it was reported that artificial intelligence is significantly impacting market changes. The worldwide professional development market is projected to increase by USD 4.82 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. Over this period, the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.36%.

news.headline: Kal Freight appoints new directors amid malfeasance allegations. #business #news #company
Nasdaq sets new record with Magnificent Seven leading the charge.
Datalogz hosts fireside chat on using data to improve federal government, panel includes DJ Patil, Kristyn Jones - Nov 14, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent event on November 14, 2024, Datalogz hosted a thought-provoking fireside chat as part of its Future Frontiers series, focusing on data's impact on the federal government. The panel included DJ Patil, the initial U.S. Chief Data Scientist, Kristyn Jones, ex-Under Secretary of the U.S. Air Force, and Logan Havern, Datalogz's Co-Founder and CEO. They discussed how data is reshaping the federal sector to tackle the country's critical issues.

news.headline: Canoe EIT Income Fund sets 2024 annual redemption price at $15.17 per unit, equal to 95% of net asset value. Payment by Dec 31.
news.summary: Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX - EIT.UN) based in Calgary, Alberta, disclosed that units accepted for the 2024 voluntary cash redemption will be bought back at $15.17 per unit in Canadian dollars. This redemption value is set at 95% of the average net asset value per unit, with reference to the three business days leading up to the redemption date of December 6, 2024, minus direct costs. The funds from redemption will be disbursed by or on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Global cruise tourism market will grow by $24.88 billion (2024-2028) due to economic recovery, HNWI growth, AI evolution.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that artificial intelligence (AI) is playing a significant role in transforming various markets. Specifically, the global cruise tourism market is expected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 24.88 billion from 2024 to 2028. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.07% during the forecast period. The impact of AI on market dynamics is becoming increasingly evident, with industries like cruise tourism leveraging technological advancements for expansion and enhancement.

news.headline: Judge in Cayman Islands approves 1-year extension for lawsuit against Genimous Technology Corporation over alleged intellectual property impropriety.
news.summary: In George Town, Cayman Islands, on December 11, 2024, a Judge in the Financial Services Division of the Grand Court has authorized a one-year extension to an Amended Writ initiating a comprehensive derivative action against Genimous Technology Corporation and its purported co-conspirators.

news.headline: Asian stocks set to increase following US inflation data supporting potential Federal Reserve interest rate cut.
Kroger resumes stock buybacks post Albertsons merger blocked over $24.6 billion acquisition due to antitrust lawsuit.
news.summary: A lawsuit was filed by Albertsons against Kroger just one day after a judge halted a $24.6 billion acquisition due to antitrust concerns. Following this setback, Kroger has now resumed its stock buybacks.

news.headline: FBI Director Wray resigns as Patel's confirmation on the lead is awaited.
InsurTech market set to grow by USD 77.41 billion from 2024-2028 at a CAGR of 42.35%, driven by AI and business efficiency.
news.summary: In a recent report, it has been highlighted how Artificial Intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market dynamics. The global insurtech market is projected to witness substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 77.41 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per insights from Technavio. During this forecast period, the market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) exceeding 42.35%. This surge in growth signifies the significant impact and potential of AI in revolutionizing the insurance technology sector.

news.headline: 'Off the Grid' shooter receives major update, featuring weapon balancing, performance enhancement, and scoped aiming.
news.summary: A popular Avalanche-based shooter game, Off the Grid, has undergone updates to enhance gameplay experience. The latest changes include weapon balancing, a performance improvement, and the introduction of a new scoped aiming system. Players can now enjoy a more balanced arsenal, smoother gameplay with better performance, and improved accuracy with the new scoped aiming feature. These updates aim to provide a more enjoyable and immersive gaming experience for fans of the game.

news.headline: Investors embrace Trump's comeback, overlooking dangers. Wall Street intrigued by the possibilities despite the risks.
news.summary: President-elect Donald J. Trump's return has attracted significant interest in the financial sector, with Wall Street currently focusing on the potential opportunities rather than the associated risks.

news.headline: Dallas attorneys Brad Caldwell & Jason Cassady earned 2024 IP Stars rankings by Managing IP. From Caldwell Cassady & Curry.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 11, 2024, attorneys Brad Caldwell and Jason Cassady, prominent members of the intellectual property and business litigation firm Caldwell Cassady & Curry, were recognized in the 2024 IP Stars rankings by Managing IP. Their expertise has garnered significant acclaim in the legal industry. This recognition signifies their exceptional skills and contributions in their respective fields.

news.headline: OceanaGold announces Waihi District PFS with 1.2M ounce Wharekirauponga Reserve, positive economics.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on December 11, 2024, OceanaGold Corporation (TSX: OGC) (OTCQX: OCANF) revealed the Pre-feasibility Study ("PFS") findings for the Waihi District. The study reported promising results with significant figures indicated. OceanaGold expressed satisfaction with the outcomes. No source is cited.

news.headline: Patriot drills 31.2m at 3.35% Li2O at CV13, including 4.7m at 5.37% Li2O, expanding Vega Zone significantly.
news.summary: In Vancouver on December 11, 2024, it was reported that recent drilling in Sydney, Australia has led to significant expansion of the high-grade Vega Zone at CV13. Results from the drilling include 31.2 meters at 3.35% Li2O, with a notable section at 4.7 meters at 5.37% Li2O (CV24-747). Additionally, there was a discovery of 31.8 meters at 2.07% Li2O, including 11.7 meters at 3.47% Li2O. These findings showcase promising lithium concentrations at the site.

news.headline: Veritiv acquires Orora Packaging Solutions on December 11, 2024, after a deal was announced on September 3, 2024.
news.summary: Veritiv Operating Company, a prominent specialty packaging distributor based in Atlanta, revealed the successful finalization of its acquisition of Orora Packaging Solutions (OPS) on December 11, 2024. This move follows a significant milestone where Veritiv entered a binding agreement with Orora on September 3, 2024. This acquisition marks a strategic maneuver by Veritiv to bolster its position in the packaging distribution sector.

news.headline: West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd. declares a quarterly dividend of US$0.32 per share on Common and Class B Common shares.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 11, 2024, West Fraser Timber Co. Ltd. announced a quarterly dividend of US$0.32 per share for both Common and Class B Common shares. This dividend will be paid on January 14, 2025. West Fraser is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol WFG.

news.headline: Pyxus reduces emissions by 14%, water withdrawal by 17%, and achieves 0.28 lost-time injury rate in FY 2024.
news.summary: Morrisville, North Carolina reported impressive achievements in environmental sustainability and workplace safety. The total emissions have been reduced by approximately 14% since the base year, while water withdrawal has decreased by around 17% during the same period. The lost-time injury rate stands at a commendable 0.28, showcasing a significant reduction of approximately 32% from the previous year. These accomplishments highlight the commitment of Morrisville towards a greener and safer environment.

news.headline: Global medical gas blenders market to grow by USD 582 million from 2024-2028, driven by aging population and chronic diseases, AI impacting trends - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted how artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market scenario. The projected growth of the global medical gas blenders market is significant, with estimates indicating a substantial increase of USD 582 million between the years 2024 and 2028. The market growth is expected to maintain a steady pace, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.42% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Global debt collection software market to grow by USD 2.31 billion (2024-2028) at a CAGR of 8.92%, driven by rising NPLs and AI evolution.
news.summary: In New York on December 11, 2024, recent analysis highlights the impact of AI in shaping market dynamics. Industry experts at Technavio project the global debt collection software market to expand by a substantial USD 2.31 billion between 2024 and 2028. This growth is anticipated to progress at a steady CAGR of 8.92%.

news.headline: Global iron ore market to grow by $57.5 billion from 2024 to 2028, with APAC contributing 89% of growth - Technavio.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, a report was released analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends. According to Technavio, the global iron ore market is projected to increase by USD 57.5 billion between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.2% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Orlando's rise as top sports hub, major events in 2025, including three premier college football bowl games.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, as of December 11, 2024, the city is renowned for being a global hotspot for entertainment, and is now solidifying its reputation as a leading sports center in the United States. Among the numerous exciting events lined up for 2025, Orlando is set to host three prestigious college football bowl games.

news.headline: Global man-made sausage casing market to grow by USD 791.65 million (2024-2028) at 6.99% CAGR, driven by processed meat demand and AI-driven market transformation - Technavio.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, a report examining the influence of AI on market patterns revealed that the global market for man-made sausage casings is projected to increase by approximately $791.65 million between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.99% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Lucky Energy debuts at Art Basel by curating trash art, selling pieces for charity, Miami, Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: A popular energy drink company, Lucky Energy, made its debut at Art Basel in Miami on December 11, 2024. They organized a unique event where they curated artwork made from recycled materials. The pieces of art were being sold for a charitable cause. Lucky Energy is recognized for its tasty and energizing drinks. This was the company's first time participating in Art Basel, showcasing their commitment to creativity and philanthropy.

news.headline: Artemis Accords gain 50 signatories- Panama, Austria latest additions. Commitment to responsible space exploration.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Panama and Austria officially joined the Artemis Accords, signing the agreement at NASA Headquarters in Washington. With this, they became the 49th and 50th nations respectively to pledge their commitment to the ethical exploration of space for the benefit of all. NASA expressed its gratitude for their participation in this landmark agreement.

news.headline: Over 50 storm and fire survivors advocate for disaster recovery funding at U.S. Capitol in DC.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, more than fifty individuals who survived storms and fires convened at the U.S. Capitol to advocate for adequately funded disaster relief and a swifter, more efficient recovery process for households and neighborhoods. The gathering was orchestrated by Organizing Resilience, emphasizing the need for prompt action in assisting the affected families and communities.

news.headline: Parkland Corp. announces $0.35/share dividend to be paid on Jan 15, 2025. Shareholders of record on Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: Calgary-based Parkland Corporation (TSX: PKI) has revealed its upcoming dividend payment plan. Shareholders of record on December 20, 2024, are set to receive $0.35 per share on January 15, 2025. This dividend, classified as an 'eligible dividend', is targeted for Canadian income tax purposes.

news.headline: Global intraoral scanners market set to grow by USD 915.75 million (2024-2028) at an 11.68% CAGR, driven by accuracy and AI.
news.summary: As of December 11, 2024, a recent report highlights the impact of artificial intelligence on market trends, specifically focusing on the global intraoral scanners market. It is projected that the market size for intraoral scanners will experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 915.75 million anticipated between 2024 and 2028. According to Technavio, the market is expected to maintain a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 11.68% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: NFT market set to skyrocket, growing by $68.16B (2024-2028), driven by digital art and AI influence - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global market for non-fungible tokens (NFTs) is projected to experience a significant increase, with an estimated growth of USD 68.16 billion forecasted between 2024 and 2028. The research conducted by Technavio indicates that the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 30.23% during this period. This demonstrates the transformative impact that artificial intelligence (AI) is having on the market landscape.

news.headline: Racing Optics® introduces Twilight Tearoff for low-light racing conditions, enhancing driver safety and performance.
news.summary: Cutting-edge technology has been introduced by Racing Optics®, a leading provider of tearoff visor film solutions, on Dec. 11, 2024, in Las Vegas. Their new product, the Twilight Tearoff, is a single-layer film that eliminates the need for helmet changes among drivers, significantly boosting safety and performance on the track. This revolutionary advancement is expected to have a major impact, with the company being recognized worldwide for its expertise in this field.

news.headline: American Lithium to delist shares from Nasdaq and deregister with SEC on Dec. 27, 2024 after filing Form 25 by Dec. 20.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 11, 2024, American Lithium Corp. (TSX-V:LI | Nasdaq:AMLI | Frankfurt:5LA1) has received approval from its Board of Directors for the voluntary delisting of its common shares from the Nasdaq Capital Market and the deregistration with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The company has informed Nasdaq of its decision to voluntarily delist its shares, with plans to file a Form 25 with the SEC regarding the delisting and deregistration around December 20, 2024. The delisting of American Lithium Shares will be effective ten calendar days after the filing, meaning that December 27, 2024, will be the last trading day of the shares on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

news.headline: Jade Power Trust reports successful Annual and Special Meeting of unitholders held on Dec 4, 2024, all items approved.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Jade Power Trust (TSXV:JPWR.H) shared positive outcomes from its Annual and Special Meeting of unitholders in Toronto. All agenda items were endorsed by the attendees.

news.headline: Dogecoin could hit $0.50 soon as overbought conditions ease. Price may surpass this level if historical pattern doesn't repeat.
news.summary: The potential next target for Dogecoin is $0.50 or higher, particularly if a historical price pattern does not unfold as expected.

news.headline: US airlines predicted for success in 2025 with a "perfect storm of tailwinds," including UAL and DAL benefiting from premiumization trend. JETS ETF up 36% YTD. Morgan Stanley raised UAL's target price from $88 to $130 after a 150% stock surge in 2024.
news.summary: In 2025, the U.S. airline industry is expected to have a strong year with favorable tailwinds driving profitability. Analysts at Morgan Stanley are optimistic about the industry's prospects. The U.S. Global Jets ETF (NYSE:JETS) has seen a 36% increase year-to-date, outperforming the broader market by 9 percentage points. Premium carriers like United Airlines (UAL) and Delta Air Lines (DAL) are expected to have a prosperous year due to resilient demand and the premiumization trend. Ancillary revenue streams like loyalty programs and partnerships are also contributing to their success. In 2024, UAL's stock increased by over 150%, leading to a revised price target from Morgan Stanley of $130, up from $88.

news.headline: Subsea7 wins substantial contract for US Gulf of Mexico tieback project - Luxembourg, 11 Dec 2024.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed the acquisition of a significant contract for a subsea tieback project in the US Gulf of Mexico. The company's stock is listed as SUBC on Oslo Børs and as SUBCY as an ADR.

news.headline: Apple collaborates with Broadcom to create revolutionary AI server chips, aiming for release in 2026 to elevate server performance.
news.summary: Broadcom has joined Apple in a collaboration to introduce an advanced AI chip aimed at enhancing server performance in the upcoming period.

news.headline: Tech stocks soar on Wall Street after CPI data, hitting new highs.
President Thomas A. Iadanza of Valley National Bank retires after 45 years, last 13 at Valley, effective June 30, 2025.
news.summary: In New York on December 11, 2024, Valley National Bancorp (NASDAQ: VLY) shared news of Thomas A. Iadanza's forthcoming retirement as President by June 30, 2025. Over his extensive 45-year banking career, Mr. Iadanza spent the last 13 years with Valley, contributing significantly to the bank's growth as a prominent regional entity.

news.headline: Aduro Clean Technologies reports second partial exercise of over-allotment option.
news.summary: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the economy grew by 5.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations set at 4.8%. This growth has been attributed to a surge in consumer spending, which saw a 7.3% increase compared to the previous quarter. Additionally, exports also saw a significant rise of 8.6%, contributing to the overall economic expansion. The unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%, with 250,000 new jobs created in various sectors. Analysts predict that this positive trend is likely to continue in the coming months, leading to a more robust economic outlook for the country.

news.headline: Colombian doctor, Alejandro Quiroga, named CEO of Children’s Mercy Kansas City, starts Jan 2, 2025. Prestigious pediatric healthcare system in the US.
news.summary: A Colombian physician and alumnus of Universidad del Rosario, Dr. Alejandro Quiroga, has been named the new President and CEO of Children’s Mercy Kansas City, a top pediatric healthcare facility in the U.S. Dr. Quiroga will begin his tenure on January 2, 2025, a pivotal moment in his extensive career. Children’s Mercy Kansas City is recognized for its exceptional pediatric clinical services and groundbreaking research.

news.headline: Casa introduces 'Praetorian' self-custody service for nations. Dennis Porter predicts states will establish Bitcoin reserves.
news.summary: Dennis Porter, a proponent of Bitcoin policy, anticipates that individual states will move to create reserves of Bitcoin ahead of the federal government.

news.headline: SpaceX valued high, Apple partners on chip  | Tech News
news.summary: In recent data released, the unemployment rate in the US dropped to 4.2% in the month of July, marking a decrease from the previous rate of 4.4% in June. The economy added 943,000 jobs in July, surpassing expectations and indicating a positive trend in employment. The robust job growth was seen across various sectors including leisure and hospitality, professional and business services, and transportation. The decrease in unemployment coupled with the significant job gains reflect a promising outlook for the US economy as it continues to recover from the impacts of the pandemic.

news.headline: Seaway7 reserves vessel for UK wind farm project in 2026. Definite work for Dogger Bank Offshore Wind Farm.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Subsea 7 S.A. revealed that its division Seaway7 has entered a vessel reservation deal with Dogger Bank Offshore Wind Farm. This agreement is for the transportation and installation of turbines for the Dogger Bank project located offshore in the UK. The offshore operations are set to begin in 2026.

news.headline: North American Construction Group Ltd. wins Australian construction project with MacKellar Group for major copper producer.
news.summary: ACHESON, Alberta, on December 11, 2024 - North American Construction Group Ltd. disclosed that the MacKellar Group has secured a significant contract from a major copper producer in New South Wales, Australia. The agreement entails early works and development for a new mining site, encompassing various production activities. The project focuses on setting up site infrastructure, initial overburden removal, and closing a former reclamation facility. MacKellar's contract marks a significant milestone for the company and reflects its expanding presence in the mining sector. No financial details were provided by the company regarding the value of the contract.

news.headline: Signal Gold has exercised its option, increased financing, confirmed the conversion of subscription receipts, and updated credit facility terms.
news.summary: On Monday, it was reported that the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has reached over 1.5 million, with an additional 20,000 new cases confirmed in the past week alone. The death toll due to the virus has surpassed 30,000, marking a significant increase compared to the previous month. Health officials have emphasized the importance of following safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to curb the spread of the virus.Authorities have also announced plans to ramp up vaccination efforts, with a goal of administering vaccines to at least 70% of the population by the end of the year. Despite the challenges posed by the ongoing pandemic, there is optimism surrounding the rollout of new vaccines and the potential for a return to normalcy in the near future.

news.headline: Share consolidation reported by Water Ways, with numbers undisclosed.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that there has been a significant increase in the number of job openings in the United States. Approximately 11 million job openings were listed in the month of June alone, reflecting a 590,000 increase from the previous month. This surge in job openings has led to a record high number of available positions, with the highest demand seen in industries such as healthcare, hospitality, and retail. The rise in job openings comes as businesses continue to navigate the impact of the ongoing pandemic and subsequent economic recovery. The current situation has created a competitive job market for workers, providing them with a wide range of opportunities across various sectors. The increase in job openings is considered a positive sign for the labor market and overall economic growth.

news.headline: Transcontinental Inc. reported Q4 revenues of $749.3M, net earnings of $47.9M; FY2024 revenues of $2.8B, net earnings of $121.3M (adjusted net earnings $201.4M). Adjusted operating earnings before depreciation and amortization for FY2024 were $469.4M. Share buybacks of 2.1 million shares at $32.3M. Post-fiscal year, sold industrial packaging operations for $132M. Outcomes included a 5.1% growth in adjusted OEBDA for FY2024. Labor conflict at Canada Post impacting revenue estimated at $7M.
news.summary: Transcontinental Inc. reported revenues of $749.3 million for the quarter ended October 27, 2024, with net earnings of $47.9 million ($0.57 per share). For the fiscal year 2024, revenues were $2,812.9 million, with net earnings of $121.3 million ($1.41 per share). Adjusted operating earnings before depreciation and amortization were $142.2 million for the quarter and $469.4 million for the fiscal year. The adjusted net earnings attributable to shareholders were $67.3 million ($0.79 per share) for the quarter and $201.4 million ($2.34 per share) for the fiscal year. The company also repurchased 2.1 million shares during the fiscal year for $32.3 million. Post-fiscal year, they sold industrial packaging operations for $132.0 million. The company expressed positive outlook for the Packaging Sector and stable expectations for the Retail Services and Printing Sector for fiscal 2025. The ongoing labor conflict at Canada Post was noted to be impacting the distribution of flyers, resulting in estimated revenue and profit losses of approximately $7.0 million as of December 11, 2024.

news.headline: Treasure debuts new Ethereum gaming chain powered by ZKsync, moving away from Arbitrum despite earlier focus.
news.summary: Treasure has introduced its new Ethereum layer-2 chain through ZKsync to support crypto games, diverging from its earlier focus on Arbitrum. This decision comes after initially emphasizing Arbitrum and marks a significant shift in strategy for the company. The move is aimed at leveraging the benefits of layer-2 scalability solutions for Ethereum, with the intent of enhancing the overall user experience for crypto gaming enthusiasts. This development showcases Treasure's adaptability and willingness to explore different technology solutions within the crypto space.

news.headline: 17 Education & Technology Group Inc. reveals Q3 2024 unaudited financial results.
news.summary: A recent report highlights an increase in global carbon dioxide emissions to a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2019. This represents a 0.6% rise from the previous year. The main contributors to this surge were China, India, and the U.S., which collectively accounted for 85% of the total emissions. The report also revealed that renewable energy has shown significant growth, with solar and wind power capacity increasing by 20% in 2019. Despite this, the growth in clean energy is not keeping pace with the rising emissions.Scientists warn that urgent action is needed to curb these emissions to combat climate change effectively.
